title: Frosthaven - Villages
description: This datapack adds a village floating in the ocean, offering a safe haven for travelers and traders. But beware — rumors speak of dangerous secrets hidden deep within the iceberg.
body:
This datapack adds a unique ocean village to world generation, designed to spawn in the following biomes:

- Cold Ocean
- Frozen Ocean
- Deep Cold Ocean
- Deep Frozen Ocean
- Deep Ocean

The upper city is fully mob-proof and safe for both players and villagers. Villagers cannot access the tunnel entrance - the only path in or out - which keeps them safely contained. Hidden within the iceberg are underground sections, accessible through secret entrances waiting to be discovered.

Every workstation is represented in the village, and there’s at least one villager for each profession (unless nitwits or children happen to spawn instead). This ensures a complete set of trades from your very first visit.

Thank you for playing my datapack, enjoy exploring Frosthaven and uncovering its secrets!

Known issues:
- One redstone door sometimes breaks during world generation, probably due to chunkborders.
- Only in 1.20.x: the world generation waterlogs blocks that arent supposed to be waterlogged.
